text: As I walk these brightly lit, modern corridors, separated by glass and technology, I feel both the stimulation of knowledge and the slight alienation that such environments can bring. When I enter the R+D exhibition space, surrounded by vibrant colors and bold statements about human connection and innovation, I sense a powerful blend of inspiration and introspection. The words on the wall and screens beckon my thoughts toward the future, yet ground me in the present act of observing. I feel curious, quietly exhilarated, and a little hopeful about how our minds strive to bridge gaps between solitude and community.
